name: Scp 970: The Cutesy Tickle Monster
description: “This one is the same as that crazed “tickle monster” girl or whatever her real name used to be, except this one is slightly crazy but also very playful. She’ll normally get excited when people come to visit her and when she gets excited she runs towards them...and...tickles them...yeah I wouldn’t recommend going near her cuz she is really fast...she may be cute but once she tickles you she’s not gonna stop so...yeah uhh i don’t know what to conclude here...uhhh...j-just stay away from her, that’s it.” -one of the scientists
creator: S0APY_DOT34
